name: SMILE Implementation Planner
description: Given an industry, use case, and resource constraints, produces a prioritized SMILE implementation plan grounded in LPI methodology data. Queries smile_phase_detail and get_methodology_step to build a structured, evidence-based plan. Output is a typed JSON schema consumed by downstream agents. Part of the Level 4 Secure Agent Mesh.

supportedInterfaces.comment: Send JSON to stdin, receive plan JSON on stdout. Requires: npm run build, ollama serve.

industry.description: Target industry (e.g. healthcare, manufacturing, smart buildings)

usecase.description: Specific use case (e.g. predictive maintenance, patient flow optimization)

constraints.description: Resource constraints (e.g. 2 developers, 3 months, no cloud)

skills.name: SMILE Implementation Planner
skills.description: Produces a 3-phase SMILE implementation plan with priorities, rationale, durations, key activities, milestones, and risks. All phases grounded in LPI smile_phase_detail and get_methodology_step data. Designed to be consumed by a devil's advocate validator agent.
examples: Plan a digital twin for healthcare patient flow with 2 developers and 3 months
Manufacturing predictive maintenance with limited budget
Smart building energy optimization with no cloud infrastructure

security.inputSanitization: Prompt injection patterns filtered. Input length capped at 500 chars per field.
security.outputSchema: Validated against typed JSON schema before passing to downstream agents.
